title: How to watch Trump's speech on the National Mall on July 4
shortDescription: President Trump will give a July 4 speech Saturday in Washington on the National Mall ahead of a fireworks display.

title: Trump's remarks at Mt. Rushmore
shortDescription: The America 250 celebration at Mt. Rushmore ended with a fireworks show after President Donald Trump's remarks.

title: Trump pokes fun at himself, roasts Obama in children's podcast
shortDescription: The 24-page book “Presidents Play!” features illustrations showing how presidents, despite their hectic schedule, unwind on the White House grounds

title: Trump pardons 6 air-pollution violators
shortDescription: President Trump announced he was pardoning six people prosecuted by the Biden administration for clean-air related offences, but did not name them.

title: How to watch Trump's speech at Mount Rushmore ahead of July 4
shortDescription: President Trump is kicking off Fourth of July weekend with a speech at Mount Rushmore. Here's where and when to tune in.

title: Trump inserts himself into Taylor Swift wedding mania
shortDescription: Despite President Trump's plans for America's 250, only one thing is dominating national and international headlines: Taylor Swift's love story.

title: Trump's Mount Rushmore speech caps hot, stormy day of 250th celebrations
shortDescription: Celebrations marking America's 250th birthday contended with record-breaking heat and a severe thunderstorm on Friday.

title: In a polarized Supreme Court, even its conservatives are divided on Trump
shortDescription: Conservatives dominate the Supreme Court, but they are not monolithic. From birthright citizenship to tariffs, the justices split with President Donald Trump.

title: Back where it all began: Congress returns to Philadelphia 250 years later
shortDescription: The ceremonial session included a bipartisan group who marked the nation's 250th birthday in the city where everything began.

title: Trump says he didn't know about windfall from family's crypto ventures
shortDescription: President Trump says he didn't know about his family's cryptocurrency ventures that helped produce a massive financial windfall.

title: Secret Service missed chances to prevent Trump shooting, report says
shortDescription: The Secret Service missed chances to prevent the 2024 shooting of Trump and was significantly understaffed, according to a pair of watchdog reports.

title: Hegseth slams protesters heckling Trump administration members in DC
shortDescription: Pete Hegseth slammed protesters on July 2 as he and other top members of the Trump administration praised the work of the National Guard in DC.

title: Is Mount Rushmore a victim of Trump's Washington, DC 'vanity' projects?
shortDescription: As of the end of fiscal 2025, NPS had a backlog of deferred maintenance projects totaling more than $24.2 billion.

title: Kid Rock dishes on his friendship with President Trump
shortDescription: Kid Rock discussed his friendship and late-night phone calls with President Trump in a recent interview with Sky News Australia.

title: Exclusive: US 250th event registration sent attendees to GOP fundraising site
shortDescription: A Trump-linked political group asked those seeking tickets to consent to getting donation requests, but changed it after USA TODAY asked questions.

title: Fox poll shows Democrats ahead in Georgia races
shortDescription: Fox poll: Democrats lead in Georgia — Ossoff 56-43 (Senate), Bottoms 52-47 (gov), June 27.
